CustomField.formula: IF( OrcaCaseTimer__Total_Time_Spent_No__c > 0, IF( FLOOR( MOD( OrcaCaseTimer__Total_Time_Spent_No__c * 24, 24 ) ) < 10 ,"0" & TEXT( FLOOR( MOD( OrcaCaseTimer__Total_Time_Spent_No__c * 24, 24 ) ) ), TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(OrcaCaseTimer__Total_Time_Spent_No__c * 24, 24)))) , "00")
CustomField.label: Hours
